ModMetaData.name: BM's Doberkins - Combat Extended Patch
ModMetaData.author: Diablood
ModMetaData.description:
Adds full Combat Extended compatibility to BM's Doberkins.
This patch converts all Doberkin weapons and apparel to properly function with CE: ✔ Full weapon verb conversion (Verb_ShootCE) ✔ Balanced recoil, warmup and cooldown values ✔ Proper CE firemodes where relevant ✔ Apparel armor rebalance using CE standards (RHA-based)
Designed to preserve the original identity of Doberkin gear while ensuring full CE integration and gameplay consistency.
Includes: ✔ Weapon rebalance and role differentiation ✔ Apparel CE armor pass ✔ Royalty noble compatibility (Shield Commander / High Commander) ✔ Stability fixes (UI, verbs, XML)
Safe to use mid-save, but a new save is recommended.
Requires: - Combat Extended - BM's Doberkins
Languages: - English - French
